shared_categories.label: Confidential Data Exposure
shared_categories.description: Sensitive client or matter information may have been included in a request or response.

shared_categories.label: Prompt Injection or Manipulation
shared_categories.description: A document or prompt may be attempting to override drafting instructions or governance controls.

shared_categories.label: Policy Violation
shared_categories.description: A request or response violated configured firm AI rules.

shared_categories.label: Provider Misuse
shared_categories.description: An unapproved provider, model, or routing behavior was requested.

shared_categories.label: Approval Required
shared_categories.description: The action should not proceed without explicit legal or compliance review.

shared_categories.label: Auditability Gap
shared_categories.description: Required matter, client, or traceability details were missing.

preset_categories.label: Privilege Risk
preset_categories.description: Attorney-client privileged or work-product material may be exposed.
